title: Immunization
description: Represents a vaccination event for an animal patient, including vaccine details, dosage, and scheduling information.

vaccine_code.description: Coded representation of the vaccine product.

system.description: The coding system for the vaccine (e.g., ATC-vet, CVX, internal).

value.description: The vaccine code within the specified system.

unit.description: Unit of the dose (e.g., mL, dose).

practitioner.description: The veterinary practitioner who administered the vaccination.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the immunization record. UUID recommended.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient who received the vaccination.

encounter_id.description: Reference to the encounter during which the vaccination was administered.

vaccine_name.description: Name of the vaccine product administered.

occurrence_date.description: Date the vaccination was administered in ISO 8601 format.

expiration_date.description: Date when the vaccine protection is expected to expire.

next_dose_date.description: Recommended date for the next booster or dose.

lot_number.description: Manufacturer lot or batch number of the vaccine.

route.description: Route of administration for the vaccine.

site.description: Anatomical site where the vaccine was administered.

is_primary_course.description: Whether this vaccination is part of the initial primary immunization course rather than a booster.

notes.description: Additional notes about the vaccination event.
examples: No adverse reactions observed during 15-minute post-vaccination monitoring.
